rows.notes: Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Clear header.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms 'Stola Ordinaria. Paid over 27/6/5' is a header/introductory line with an inline amount, not columnar data. gpt-5-mini incorrectly parsed this as an 'entry' with columnar amounts and misread parts of the description.
Selected gemini-flash for description 'Dues' which visually matches better than 'Do:' from gpt-5-mini.
Combined gemini-flash's correct year '1834' with gpt-5-mini's correct amounts '6 6 0'. gemini-flash misread the pounds amount as '1' and gpt-5-mini misread the year as '1837'.
rows.english_description: Subscription paid to the Infirmary for the year 1834.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Subscription paid to the Infirmary for the year 1834, amounting to £6 6s 0d.
